All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AudioManager
Manages background music playback for the application by dividing a single audio file into named sections and switching between them based on the current game state.
AudioReceiver
Marks a controller or component as capable of receiving a shared AudioManager instance through dependency injection.
GameController
Main controller for the game screen.
GameData
Utility class that holds shared game state across scenes.
GameModel
Model class containing the core business logic of the game.
GameModelAdapter
Adapter class that wraps GameModel and implements IGameModel.
GameView
View class responsible for scene navigation in the game.
IGameModel
Interface that defines the contract for the game's business logic.
Main
Entry point of the Escritura Rapida application.
PauseController
Controller for the results/pause screen displayed after the game ends.
StartController
Controller for the start screen of the application.
